HomePage.subtitle: Ideas Worth Spreading - Join us for an inspiring journey of innovation, creativity, and thought-provoking conversations.
HomePage.speakersDescription: Connect with inspiring speakers sharing groundbreaking ideas.
HomePage.eventsDescription: Participate in talks, VR experiences, and interactive sessions.
HomePage.communityDescription: Join a community of innovators, creators, and change-makers.
HomePage.readyDescription: Explore our management tools and join the TEDx experience.

AdminDashboard.title: Admin Dashboard
AdminDashboard.subtitle: Manage your TEDx event with powerful admin tools
AdminDashboard.userManagementDescription: Create, edit, and manage users. Handle speaker profiles and user types.
AdminDashboard.userManagementFeatures: • Create new users • Edit user details • Manage speaker profiles
AdminDashboard.eventManagementDescription: Create and organize events, set capacity, assign presenters, and manage schedules.
AdminDashboard.eventManagementFeatures: • Schedule events • Set capacity • Assign presenters
AdminDashboard.systemMonitoringDescription: Monitor system health and API status for optimal performance.
AdminDashboard.systemMonitoringFeatures: • System status • Database connectivity • API performance
AdminDashboard.databaseManagementDescription: Manage database operations and view system information.
AdminDashboard.databaseManagementFeatures: • Database health • Connection status • Data integrity

UserManagement.title: User Management
UserManagement.noUsersFound: No users found. Create your first user!
UserManagement.name: Name
UserManagement.noUserSelectedDescription: Select a user from the list to view details, or create a new user.
UserManagement.deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this user?

EventManagement.title: Events Management
EventManagement.noEventsDescription: Create your first event to get started!
EventManagement.selectActionDescription: Create a new event or edit an existing one
